title: Agent runs
description: One record of a background specialist-agent run kicked off for a trip (planning, deal-hunting, packing, transit, research). Powers the live RunStrip so long-running agent work is visible while it happens instead of finishing invisibly.

tripId.description: the trip this run is working on

label.description: short human label shown as a live pill, e.g. 'Planning your trip'

status.description: 'running' while in flight, 'done' when the work landed, 'error' on failure

detail.description: optional one-line progress detail or error message

endedAt.description: when the run finished (done or error); null while running
